'''yaruhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chadah|chadah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chadah|chadah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yaruhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yærihith|yærihith]] || [[word:yærihij|yærihij]] || [[word:yærihish|yærihish]] || [[word:yærihi|yærihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yaruruhuth|yaruruhuth]] || [[word:yaruruhuj|yaruruhuj]] || [[word:yaruruhush|yaruruhush]] || [[word:yaruruhu|yaruruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaruhuth|yaruhuth]] || [[word:yaruhuj|yaruhuj]] || [[word:yaruhush|yaruhush]] || [[word:yaruhu|yaruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarufhuth|yarufhuth]] || [[word:yarufhuj|yarufhuj]] || [[word:yarufhush|yarufhush]] || [[word:yarufhuf|yarufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaruhuthu|yaruhuthu]] || [[word:yaruhuju|yaruhuju]] || [[word:yaruhushu|yaruhushu]] || [[word:yaruhuku|yaruhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaruhuth|yaruhuth]] || [[word:yaruhuj|yaruhuj]] || [[word:yaruhush|yaruhush]] || [[word:yaruhu|yaruhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaruhuthul|yaruhuthul]] || [[word:yaruhujul|yaruhujul]] || [[word:yaruhushul|yaruhushul]] || [[word:yaruhukul|yaruhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaruhuthuthu|yaruhuthuthu]] || [[word:yaruhujuju|yaruhujuju]] || [[word:yaruhushushu|yaruhushushu]] || [[word:yaruhuku|yaruhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaruhuthun|yaruhuthun]] || [[word:yaruhujun|yaruhujun]] || [[word:yaruhushun|yaruhushun]] || [[word:yaruhukun|yaruhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaruhuthuoro|yaruhuthuoro]] || [[word:yaruhujuoro|yaruhujuoro]] || [[word:yaruhushuoro|yaruhushuoro]] || [[word:yaruhukuoro|yaruhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
